title: Uncraftable
description: This mod adds recipes to items you would otherwise not be able to get by normal means.
body:
# Info

This mod adds recipes to items you would otherwise not be able to get by normal means.





## Current recipes available

- Bedrock

- Sapling

- Gold Ore

- Dead Bush

- Iron ore

- Elytra

- Barrier

- Totem of Undying

- Enchanted Golden Apple

- Cobweb

- String

- Iron Horse Armour

- Saddle

- Name Tag

- Bell

- Golden Horse Armour

- Leather Horse Armour

- Diamond Horse Armour



## Planned to be added

- Every Ore

- Every Sapling

- Command Block

- Nether Star

- Spawn Eggs

- Things I come across during gameplay

- Ender Pearls
